subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-03-20
subcodes.first_line: Do you observe these trenches? The Ottoman government wishes through these fortifications to prevent the ships [3.5s]... ...During the reign of 'Abdu'l-Hamid when a group of soldiers volunteered to fight against the Russians
subcodes.first_line_orig: این خنقدقها را میبینید دولت عثمانی میخواهد با این خندقها از کشتیهای ... در ایام عبدالحمید که فرقه عسگر متطوع
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
